headline: Here’s Gator Capital Management’s Investment Thesis for Ameriprise Financial (AMP)
summary: Gator Capital Management, an investment management company, released its first-quarter 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter is available to download here. During the first quarter of 2026, the Funds delivered weak absolute and mixed relative performance, underperforming the broader market and outperforming the Financials sector benchmark. Investments in small and mid-cap Financials slightly outperformed […]
